title: Fragments
content:
I
Locke sank into a swoon;
The Garden died;
God took the spinning-jenny
Out of his side.

II
Where got I that truth?
Out of a medium's mouth.
Out of nothing it came,
Out of the forest loam,
Out of dark night where lay
The crowns of Nineveh.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Butler Yeats delivers a powerful performance in "Fragments"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
